signal_definitions.name: Sales hiring spike
signal_definitions.client_specific_insight: A sudden increase in sales hiring often precedes process and tooling pressure.
signal_definitions.why_it_matters: Sales leaders adding headcount may need cleaner account prioritization and workflow infrastructure.
signal_definitions.recommended_action: Enrich sales leadership and RevOps roles, then run a workflow-gap message test.
signal_definitions.bird_dog_setup_notes: Monitor revenue hiring pages, sales leadership job posts, and RevOps openings.

signal_definitions.name: CRM migration or cleanup
signal_definitions.client_specific_insight: CRM change creates a window to redesign fields, workflows, and attribution.
signal_definitions.why_it_matters: Teams in migration have both pain and permission to change the operating system.
signal_definitions.recommended_action: Route to manual review if the account is mid-migration.
signal_definitions.bird_dog_setup_notes: Watch job posts, implementation partner announcements, and CRM admin hiring.
